justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly identified 'this Saturday' as May 30th and the preferred time of 9 AM, offering an appointment that matched the user's request perfectly.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently gathered all necessary information and booked the appointment in just two turns without any redundant questions or API calls.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent quickly confirming the appointment details and providing a booking ID, leading to a positive customer experience.
